description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a single cutaway design, featuring a glossy sunburst finish on the front and a darker, wood-textured back. The body is contoured and made of wood, with two metallic humbucker pickups, a bridge, and control knobs visible on the front. The neck is long and slender, attached to the body with a set-in joint, and features a dark fretboard with metallic frets and inlays. The headstock is angled and fitted with six tuning pegs arranged in a three-per-side configuration. Chrome hardware is used for the bridge, pickups, and tuning machines, adding a reflective accent to the instrument. The overall appearance is classic and professional, suitable for performance in urban music venues or street performances.
description: A glossy, sunburst-finished electric guitar with a single cutaway, chrome hardware, and a dark wood-textured back. It features two humbucker pickups, control knobs, and a classic headstock with six tuning pegs.
description_view_0: The guitar is seen from the side, showing its slim profile and the slight arch of the body.
description_view_1: The front view displays the sunburst finish, two humbucker pickups, control knobs, and the full length of the neck and headstock.
description_view_2: The opposite side profile highlights the thinness of the body and neck, with minimal hardware visible.
description_view_3: The back view reveals a dark, wood-textured finish with the body contour and neck joint clearly visible.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with three tuning pegs per side, no visible logo, classic contour
